ConstValues.value: "This app uses required storage for essential functionality, with optional storage for analytics and marketing. Virginia residents can opt out of the sale of personal data and targeted advertising, and can limit the processing of sensitive personal data. Select “Agree & Proceed” to allow all, “Required Only” to allow essential only, or “Manage Choices” to customize your preferences. To learn more about how {brand} processes personal data, please review our {cookiePolicy}."

"This app uses required storage for essential functionality, with optional storage for analytics and marketing. Florida residents can opt out of the sale of personal data and targeted advertising, and can limit the processing of sensitive personal data. Select “Agree & Proceed” to allow all, “Required Only” to allow essential only, or “Manage Choices” to customize your preferences. To learn more about how {brand} processes personal data, please review our {cookiePolicy}."

"Nebraska residents: This app uses required storage and similar technologies for essential functionality, and optional storage and similar technologies to enhance your experience, measure usage, and support marketing activities. You may opt out of the sale of personal data and targeted advertising, and you may provide choices for sensitive personal data processing where applicable. Select “Agree & Proceed” to allow optional storage, “Required Only” to allow essential storage only, or “Manage Choices” to customize your preferences. To learn more about how {brand} processes personal data, please review our {cookiePolicy}."
